Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.606

Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to Specialist Thomas Edwin Beglinger
Summary: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system in the county of Wyoming, constituting state route 98 from School Street in the town of Sheldon at the southern end to the southern line of the village of Attica, to Specialist Thomas Edwin Beglinger.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to Specialist Thomas Edwin Beglinger
